code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut current = ""
  mut has_digit = false
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if has_digit
        let num = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        let doubled = num * 2
        if first
          result = "#{doubled}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
        end
        current = ""
        has_digit = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has_digit = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    let num = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let doubled = num * 2
    if first
      result = "#{doubled}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
end
